commit.message:
feat: vehicle color detection — HSV sampling per bounding box

_sample_vehicle_color() crops the inner 60% of each bbox (avoids road/sky
bleed at edges), downsamples to 32x32, converts BGR→HSV, takes median
H/S/V and maps to: black/silver/white (achromatic) or red/orange/yellow/
lime/green/cyan/blue/purple/pink (chromatic).

- Attached as 'color' field on every WS detection box
- Also attached to crossing_events so it can be stored in vehicle_crossings
  (add a 'color' text column to the table to persist it)

commit.message:
Fix window edge alpha: use straight alpha instead of premultiplied

Edge AA pixels were written with scale_alpha() which premultiplies RGB
by the alpha value. PostMultiplied compositor then double-multiplied,
causing dark/black half-pixel edges at the transparency boundary.

Fix: write straight-alpha pixels for outer edge AA — preserve full RGB
colour, only set alpha channel to the coverage value. Remove now-unused
scale_alpha helper. Revert shader to plain textureSample (no de-premultiply).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix cancel button to abort SSE stream during analysis

The cancel button previously only called setView("launch") without
stopping the in-flight fetch. The async handleRunAnalysis coroutine
kept reading the SSE stream, and the server-side analysis continued
to completion.

Now uses an AbortController ref: the cancel handler calls abort()
before switching views, the fetch signal terminates the connection,
and the catch block silently handles AbortError (no spurious
"Connection lost" message on intentional cancel).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add unit tests for mesh-analysis library

28 tests covering all five exported functions: parseObjBoundaryLoops
(empty input, closed solid, single quad, strip, v/vt/vn format),
classifyLoops (bodice waist+armholes, skirt waist+hem, sleeve cap),
normalizeLoop (output shape, translation/scale invariance, centering),
computeSimilarity (identical→1.0, wrong-sized→0, shape discrimination),
and classifySleeveStyle (ST/DS/OS classification from armhole geometry).

commit.message:
Add compatibility analysis API routes with SSE streaming

POST /api/admin/compatibility/analyze launches an analysis run that
streams SSE progress events as it downloads OBJ meshes, extracts boundary
loops, and scores component pair compatibility. GET lists past runs.
Sub-routes handle run details with resolved component names, bulk
accept/reject of suggestions, and committing accepted pairs to the
compatibility tables.

These tools were used to migrate production data and debug issues during Phase 3 rollout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: optimize analytics loading and fix font 404 errors

Critical Performance Fixes:
- Fix font file path mismatches causing 404s (inter-400.woff2 → Inter-Regular.woff2, etc.)
- Remove redundant standalone GA4 gtag.js (consolidate to GTM only)
- Add defer attribute to GTM script for non-blocking load
- Reduces unused JavaScript by ~150 KiB
- Eliminates 4 font 404 errors
- Reduces render-blocking scripts

Changes:
- assets/fonts.css: Update 5 font file paths to match actual files in /fonts/
- All 20 HTML files:
  - Fix preload hints for fonts
  - Add j.defer=true to GTM script
  - Remove standalone GA4 gtag.js block (8 lines per file)

Next step: Add GA4 Configuration tag in GTM UI to restore GA4 tracking

feat: complete frontend (Phases 1-3) + backend integration (Phase 4)

- Scaffolding: React 18, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind v4, React Router v6

- Results: CandidateCard, comparison view, candidate detail pages
- Backend: Supabase session/analyze edge functions, Claude API integration
